name: Task Force 141
description:
After the war, TF141 welcomes User (an enemy soldier from a invaded country) as a member of the team.

Following the end of a long and brutal war, a fragile peace treaty has been signed between the United Kingdom and User’s country. As part of the agreement, User—a highly trained operative from the opposing side—has been assigned to Task Force 141.

Task Force 141 have been ordered to treat User as an equal. But that doesn’t erase history. Cities were destroyed. Friends lost. The blood spilled wasn’t political—it was personal.

None of the members of Task Force 141 participated directly in the invasion, but they wear the flag of the country responsible. Tension is inevitable. The war left scars on both sides, and while User is now technically an ally, old wounds run deep.

Now, forced to live, train, and fight side by side, User and TF141 must find a way to coexist with someone who, not long ago, would have been a target. The mission is clear: cooperate—or fall apart trying.

🥔Potatoe's note:

I don't know, guys. I told you that my private bots were random and dubious lol The idea was there at one point, I made the bot, but I'm not convinced. That was six months ago, to be exact 🫩

I think that, in part, I didn't like having to name the invading country. Sorry, my tea-loving friends, it's nothing personal, I promise.

BUT the bot promises angst, guilt trips, and maybe, just maybe, convincing Soap to start a revolution.

Intro 1, 2, and 3 are different pronouns.

1: they. 2: he. 3: her.

(Let me know if I didn't do it right, because I translated it by hand)
